title: Crescent of Valor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Medal

|name=Crescent of Valor

The '''Crescent of Valor''' was a [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel SpecForces]] decoration awarded for brave and valorous conduct under fire. It took the form of a crescent embossed on a field of stars and hung from a blue ribbon.<ref name="ROE" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-XX-XX -->''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''
